criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: O(NK) per iteration vs K^N brute-force. Maximally concrete with named symbols and stakes.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Six rungs sequenced correctly. Minor: rung 3 conflates responsibilities with Q definition.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Exact Q formula, M-step argmax, full sandwich inequality.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: Theta, Z, q, argmax all defined. Minor: 'separable' used at t=70 without explicit definition.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: All draws specified with shape, labels, axes, annotations.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Highlights follow writes. Two likelihood diagrams may visually clash unless renderer treats them as evolving canvas.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Four draws plus writes/highlights. Two likelihood-surface diagrams could be merged into one animated canvas.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: ELBO, Jensen direction, sandwich inequality all correct. Minor cosmetic mix in board notation.

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: Correct omission. Mechanism is the proof, not pseudocode.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: Seven beats over 270s; ~38s/beat. Beat at t=70 packs tightness, E-step, responsibilities, Q -- dense.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Sandwich inequality appears in convergence beat AND summary beat -- third repetition is partial redundancy.

topThreeIssues: Beat at t=70 overloaded: tightness condition + E-step + responsibilities + Q-function in one 50s beat -- split tightness/E-step from Q-function

Two likelihood-surface diagrams (likelihood_lowerbound_curve and em_iteration_diagram) are separate static snapshots -- merge into one evolving canvas to strengthen the iterative-ascent visual narrative
Convergence beat (t=210) and summary beat (t=248) restate the sandwich inequality and local-max conclusion redundantly -- differentiate by foregrounding initialization sensitivity in summary
summary: High-quality plan correctly answering the convergence question with precise math, clean staircase, concrete payoff. Board visual support is adequate. Main weaknesses: dense E-step beat and near-redundant final two beats.
